text: - iv. Commercial General Liability Insurance (off site for Enrolled Parties) covering  claims  for  personal  injury,  bodily  injury  and  property  damage arising out of the Work and in a form providing coverage no less broad than that  of  the  current  ISO  Commercial  General  Liability  Insurance  policy (Occurrence  Form,  number  CG  00  01).    Such  insurance  shall  provide coverage  for  all  operations  including  the  products-completed  operations hazard,  including  products  liability  for  any  product  manufactured  onsite and/or off-site, and shall be maintained for ten years after Final Completion of the last Phase to be completed and acceptance of the final payment for the Work, or to the applicable Statute of Repose, whichever is less.  The limits of such insurance shall not be less than:
